# Resume/CV Placeholder

Replace this file with your actual resume or CV.

Recommended specifications:
- Format: PDF (preferred) or DOC/DOCX
- File size: < 2MB
- Name: resume.pdf or cv.pdf

Example usage in code:
```javascript
resumeUrl: "/assets/documents/resume.pdf"
```

For download links in components:
```jsx
<a href="/assets/documents/resume.pdf" download>Download Resume</a>
```
